understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate a tile grid level by reaching the goal gem tile ('+') while avoiding spike tiles that end the run. Each level gives 2 attempts with 50 moves each to complete it efficiently.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is primarily horizontal (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT). After a horizontal move, the character falls in the current gravity direction (in this downward-gravity level) until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes clickable breakable blocks at a specified coordinate without moving the player. UNDO reverts the previous action. Spike tiles kill on contact. The fall previews (left_landing/right_landing) show landing positions after gravity, and corridor scans reveal passages to new sections.
